raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Housing and Community Development has awarded a $29 million Homekey grant to convert a Travelodge hotel into affordable housing units.",
    "This project aims to provide housing and supportive services for individuals and families experiencing, or at risk of, homelessness.",
    "The State of California's investment of $29 million is in addition to over $7 million from the County of Orange for the project.",
    "The project intends to transform an aging hotel into a private rental housing community of 78 units for individuals coming out of homelessness or at risk of homelessness.",
    "The residential community will include 36 studio units, 40 one-bedroom units, and two two-bedroom units set aside for staff.",
    "Construction of the housing units is expected to take one year, with the apartments set to be fully leased by the end of 2025."
  ]
}
```
